recap:
- Embeddings are crucial for converting unstructured text into machine-readable vectors, ensuring semantic meaning is preserved in vector space.
- The embedding model used for documents and queries must be the same to maintain alignment for effective retrieval.
- Approximate Nearest Neighbor (ANN) algorithms provide speed and scalability, but incorporating a reranker can enhance search relevance despite added latency and cost.
- Hybrid search strategies combine vector similarity with reranking to improve retrieval outcomes beyond pure similarity methods.
- Mosaic AI Vector Search automates embedding management through Delta Sync, simplifying operations and ensuring robust security with Unity Catalog.
- The system supports various ingestion modes (Managed, Self-Managed, Direct CRUD), reducing the complexity of managing separate vector database infrastructures.
